ddls:
CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the distributor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distributor's role and responsibilities */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or country where the distributor operates */,
  "distribution_method" TEXT /* Method of distribution (e.g., email, API, web portal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_protocols" (
  "transport_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport protocol */,
  "supported_versions" TEXT /* Versions of the protocol supported by the bridge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bridge operator, distributor, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bridge being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bridge information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bridge information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bridge_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the bridge data */,
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bridge */,
  "version_number" REAL /* Version number of the bridge data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bridge_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bridge the note is about */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bridge_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
